name: Baked Stuff Pattypan Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven temperature to 350°F.
2. Cut the squash in half horizontally and scoop out the seeds.
3. Chop the onion.
4. Crumble sausage and cook until no longer pink. Remove from the pan with a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add onion to the fat in the pan and cook until soft, about 2 minutes.
6. Combine sausage, onion, parsley, bread crumbs, pepper, and 2 tablespoons water in a bowl.
7. Divide the mixture among the squash halves.
8. Brush the tops of the stuffing and squash with olive oil.
9. Pour 1/2-inch water into a large baking pan.
10. Place the squash in the pan, cover, and bake for 30 minutes.
11. Uncover and bake until the squash is tender and the stuffing is browned, about 15 minutes.
Work: 30 minutes, total 1 hour and 25 minutes
CAL 577 per serving, 39g fat
